bird.name: Juan Fernández petrel
bird.summary: The Juan Fernández petrel (Pterodroma externa) is a species of seabird in the family Procellariidae. It nests on a single island off the co…

relations.subject: Juan Fernández petrel
relations.evidence: It is threatened at its nesting sites by predation from introduced species (cats and rats) and, to a lesser extent, from habitat loss caused by introduced herbivores (goats)
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Juan Fernández petrel
relations.evidence: The IUCN Red List lists the species as vulnerable due to its endemic status and threats from introduced predators
relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。
